title: Surgeon Vacancy at Dr Lal PathLabs - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Dr Lal PathLabs - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Dr Lal PathLabs in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Dr Lal PathLabs:
Dr Lal PathLabs is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr Lal PathLabs!
